body.title: UnseenUniversity — runtime substrate spec finalized
body.text:
# D-agent-datacenter-spec-2026-04-27
**title:** UnseenUniversity — runtime substrate spec finalized
**date:** 2026-04-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-agent-datacenter-project

## Decision narrative
Designed and documented UnseenUniversity: a runtime substrate providing uniform device lifecycle management, a real IMAP-backed communications bus (not metaphor), and a self-describing device model where every component — Postgres, Igor, Claude, inference, web server, Discord — presents the same interface. The spec at /home/akien/TheIgorsProject/akien/ideas/unseen_university.txt includes directory tree, founding design decisions, and a 4-phase build order. T-agent-datacenter-project is the tracking ticket; per-phase child tickets are filed at implementation time.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-01T16:13:28.574483+00:00
**Ticket count:** 1 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-agent-datacenter-project (XL) — UnseenUniversity — runtime substrate for Igor and future agent deployments  `done` — All 4 phases shipped: Phase 1 (foundations + registry + IMAP bus + skeleton + access control + router + health rollup, commits 4159133/82fbbda/6ddb3bf/a2989ef), Phase 2-3 (igor + inference + claude de

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
